metadata.description: Agent skills for writing, editing, and debugging Typst documents and Touying presentations

plugins.name: typst-author
plugins.description: Generate idiomatic Typst (.typ) code, edit and troubleshoot Typst documents and projects, and answer Typst syntax/reference questions. Use when working with .typ files or when the user asks for Typst document creation, editing, debugging, compilation, formatting, template work, or package usage.

plugins.name: touying-author
plugins.description: Author, refactor, and troubleshoot Typst slide decks built with Touying. Use when creating presentations with Touying themes, animations, speaker notes, or multi-file slide deck projects.
